
# Mini-Project

The main task of the project is:

Implement a chess queen domination solver.

The question that the solver needs to answer is whether it is possible to place n queens on an i x j board (rectangular chessboard with i rows and j columns) such that all squares are attacked or have a queen on them.

You can start from the queen independence problem, but be sure to understand the differences (there we only discussed square boards [special case where i=j] and the problem is of course different [queens should not attack each other]) . 

For the input
```
2 4 5
```
a valid output would be
```
3 2
3 3
```
I used this recipe:[ ASP-Chef recipe for ASP development](https://asp-chef.alviano.net/#%21)
